governanceCache.description: Enhanced caching with sharding and versioning

tokenBuckets.description: Concurrency control with per-tenant token buckets

taskWriter.description: Kafka writers for tasks and results

isPaused.description: In a real system, this would be a proper job scheduler.

semanticService.description: Dependency on SemanticModelService to get asset metadata like certification status.

Allowed.description: Allowed maps module name -> source code

Cost.description: Cost is a relative cost score (lower runs earlier).

FailureLikelihood.description: FailureLikelihood is a relative likelihood in [0,1] (higher runs earlier within same Cost).

RequiredFieldPaths.description:
RequiredFieldPaths are dot-paths that must be present in the input record for this rule.
Example: "account.account_type" or "page.aum".

quotas.description: In-memory cache of quotas: TenantID -> Resource -> Limit/Window

usage.description:
In-memory usage tracker: TenantID:Resource -> count
Simplified sliding window or fixed window reset
